tables.description: Subject ID, ethnicity, race, gender, height, weight, history of malignancy of participants, specimen characteristics, tumor and normal samples, anesthesia, tumor characteristics, carcinoembryonic antigen, colon or rectal cancer present, age at diagnosis, pathologic diagnosis, history of participant hemotherapy, radiation therapy, mastectomy, and neo-adjuvant tumor treatment of participants with breast cancer and involved in the "Clinical Proteomic Tumor Analysis Consortium (CPTAC) Proteogenomic Confirmatory Study of Breast, Colon, Lung, and Ovarian Tumors" project.

variables.name: Aliquots_Plasma
variables.description: Number of tubes of plasma obtained from the participant

variables.name: Anesthesia_Time
variables.description: Time when anesthesia was administered to the participant.

variables.name: Axillary_Staging_Method
variables.description: Using the pathology/laboratory report, provide the axillary staging method used to detect nodal involvement

variables.name: Axillary_Staging_Method_Other
variables.description: If the axillary staging method used was not included in the list provided, please describe the method used

variables.name: Biopsy_Device
variables.description: Provide the type of biopsy device used (e.g., 10g Bard biopsy device)

variables.name: Blood_Collection_Method
variables.description: Method for obtaining the blood sample

variables.name: Blood_Collection_Time
variables.description: The 24-hr clock time on the day of when the CPTAC blood sample(s) was/were collected from the participant.

variables.name: CRF_Name
variables.description: Information collected on Case Report Form (CRF) at |Submission, Baseline, 1 year follow up, 5 year follow up]

variables.name: Estrogen_Receptor_IHC_Percent_Positive
variables.description: If IHC estrogen receptor testing was performed, provide the percent of estrogen receptor positive by IHC.

variables.name: Estrogen_Receptor_IHC_Positivity_Intensity_Scale
variables.description: Using the pathology/laboratory report, indicate the intensity scale used for the estrogen receptor positivity score.

variables.name: Estrogen_Receptor_IHC_Positivity_Other_Method_Description
variables.description: If a special method was used to calculate estrogen receptor status (e.g. dextran coated charcoal), describe the method used.

variables.name: Estrogen_Receptor_IHC_Positivity_Other_Scale
variables.description: If another scale was used to measure the estrogen receptor positivity, please describe the scale used.

variables.name: Estrogen_Receptor_IHC_Positivity_Score
variables.description: Provide the positivity score using the IHC intensity scale, found on the pathology/laboratory report.

variables.name: Estrogen_Receptor_Status_by_IHC
variables.description: If IHC estrogen receptor testing was performed, provide the result of the test.  If this test was not performed, select not performed, and continue to the progesterone receptor questions. If this test was performed but not available, select Performed but Not Available and continue to the progesterone receptor questions.

variables.name: HER2_ERBB2_Status_FISH_Average_Signals
variables.description: If HER2 copy number testing was performed by FISH, provide the average number of HER2 FISH signals for this participant.  If this test was not performed, leave this question blank and move to the next question

variables.name: HER2_ERBB2_Status_FISH_Centromere17_Cell_Counts
variables.description: Indicate the total number of cells counted by FISH for HER2 & Centromere 17 copy numbers.  If these tests were not performed, leave this question blank and move to the next question

variables.name: HER2_ERBB2_Status_FISH_Centromere17_Other_Scale
variables.description: If an additional scale was used to measure HER2 & Centromere 17 positivity, please describe the scale used

variables.name: HER2_ERBB2_Status_FISH_Centromere17_Ratio
variables.description: If HER2 copy number and Centromere 17 copy number testing was performed by FISH, provide the ratio of the outcomes of these tests. (For example, if both the HER2 copy number and the Centromere 17 copy number equal 2, the ratio would be 2.2 or 1.0.)

variables.name: HER2_ERBB2_Status_FISH_Centromere17_Signals
variables.description: If Centromere 17 copy number testing was performed by FISH, provide the average number of Centromere 17 signals for this patient.  If this test was not performed, leave this question blank and move to the next question

variables.name: HER2_ERBB2_Status_IHC_Positivity_Other_Method_Description
variables.description: If a special method was used to calculate HER2/ERBB2 status, describe the method used.

variables.name: HER2_ERBB2_Status_IHC_Positivity_Other_Scale
variables.description: If an additional scale was used to measure HER2/ERBB2 positivity, please describe the scale used.

variables.name: HER2_ERBB2_Status_IHC_Positivity_Score
variables.description: Provide the positivity score using the IHC intensity scale, found on the pathology/laboratory report.

variables.name: HER2_ERBB2_Status_Positivity_Other_Method_Description
variables.description: If a special method was used to calculate HER2 & Centromere 17 positivity, describe the method used

variables.name: HER2_ERBB2_Status_by_FISH
variables.description: If HER2/ERBB2 FISH testing was performed, provide the result of the test.  If this test was not performed, select Not Performed.

variables.name: HER2_ERBB2_Status_by_IHC
variables.description: If IHC HER2/ERBB2 testing was performed, provide the result of the test.  If this test was not performed or unknown, select Not Performed or Unknown, and continue to the HER2/ERBB2 FISH questions.

variables.name: HER2_ERBB2_Statusr_IHC_Percent_Positive
variables.description: If IHC HER2/ERBB2 testing was performed, provide the percent of HER2/ERBB2 positive by IHC.  If HER2/ERBB2 was negative, continue to the HER2/ERBB2 FISH questions.

variables.name: Histological_Subtype
variables.description: Using the participant pathology/laboratory report, select the histology and/or subtype of the tumor submitted for CPTAC. (Note: All other subtypes not listed are excluded from this study.)

variables.name: Histological_Subtype_Mixed_or_Other
variables.description: Specify mixed histology or other histological subtype

variables.name: IHC_Staining_Used
variables.description: Indicate whether immunohistochemistry (IHC) staining was performed to detect micro metastasis

variables.name: Initial_Diagnosis_Age_Months
variables.description: Provide the age of the participant in months, at the time the participant was initially pathologically diagnosed

variables.name: Lymph_Nodes_Examined
variables.description: Indicate whether any lymph nodes were examined at the time of the primary resection. If the tumor tissue supplied to CPTAC was obtained using vacuum-assisted coring, enter NA and skip the rest of this section.

variables.name: Lymph_Nodes_Examined_Number
variables.description: Provide the number of lymph nodes examined, if one or more lymph nodes were removed

variables.name: Lymph_Nodes_Positive_Hematoxylin_Eosin_Staining_Number
variables.description: Provide the number of lymph nodes positive through hematoxylin and eosin (H&E) staining and light microscopy

variables.name: Lymph_Nodes_Positive_IHC_Keratin_Staining_Number
variables.description: Provide the number of lymph nodes positive through keratin immunohistochemistry (IHC) staining

variables.name: Method_of_Pathologic_Diagnosis
variables.description: Provide the procedure used to initially diagnose the participant

variables.name: Method_of_Pathologic_Diagnosis_Other
variables.description: If the procedure used to initially diagnose the participant was not included in the list provided, please describe the method used

variables.name: Normal_Sample_1_Comments
variables.description: Comments regarding the gross appearance of the normal segment or core

variables.name: Normal_Sample_1_Excision_Time
variables.description: The 24-hr clock time when normal segment 1 was excised

variables.name: Normal_Sample_1_Ischemia_Time
variables.description: Calculated ischemia time. The difference between time of immersion in LN2 and surgical excision time

variables.name: Normal_Sample_1_LN2_Time
variables.description: The 24-hour clock time when the normal segment  was immersed in LN2 vapor

variables.name: Normal_Sample_1_Weight
variables.description: Weight of normal segment in mg

variables.name: Normal_Sample_2_Comments
variables.description: Comments regarding the gross appearance of the normal segment or core

variables.name: Normal_Sample_2_Excision_Time
variables.description: The 24-hr clock time when normal segment 2 was excised

variables.name: Normal_Sample_2_Ischemia_Time
variables.description: Calculated ischemia time. The difference between time of immersion in LN2 and surgical excision time

variables.name: Normal_Sample_2_LN2_Time
variables.description: The 24-hour clock time when the normal segment  was immersed in LN2 vapor

variables.name: Normal_Sample_2_Weight
variables.description: Weight of normal segment in mg

variables.name: Normal_Sample_3_Comments
variables.description: Comments regarding the gross appearance of the normal segment or core

variables.name: Normal_Sample_3_Excision_Time
variables.description: The 24-hr clock time when normal segment was excised

variables.name: Normal_Sample_3_Ischemia_Time
variables.description: Calculated ischemia time. The difference between time of immersion in LN2 and surgical devascularization time

variables.name: Normal_Sample_3_LN2_Time
variables.description: The 24-hour clock time when the normal segment  was immersed in LN2 vapor

variables.name: Normal_Sample_3_Weight
variables.description: Weight of normal segment in mg

variables.name: Normal_Sample_4_Comments
variables.description: Comments regarding the gross appearance of the normal segment or core

variables.name: Normal_Sample_4_Excision_Time
variables.description: The 24-hr clock time when normal tissue sample was devascularized

variables.name: Normal_Sample_4_Ischemia_Time
variables.description: Calculated ischemia time. The difference between time of immersion in LN2 and surgical devascularization time

variables.name: Normal_Sample_4_LN2_Time
variables.description: The 24-hour clock time when the normal segment  was immersed in LN2 vapor

variables.name: Normal_Sample_4_Weight
variables.description: Weight of normal segment in mg

variables.name: Normal_Sample_5_Comments
variables.description: Comments regarding the gross appearance of the normal segment or core

variables.name: Normal_Sample_5_Excision_Time
variables.description: The 24-hr clock time when normal tissue sample was devascularized

variables.name: Normal_Sample_5_Ischemia_Time
variables.description: Calculated ischemia time. The difference between time of immersion in LN2 and surgical devascularization time

variables.name: Normal_Sample_5_LN2_Time
variables.description: The 24-hour clock time when the normal segment  was immersed in LN2 vapor

variables.name: Normal_Sample_5_Weight
variables.description: Weight of normal segment in mg

variables.name: Normal_Sample_Number
variables.description: Specify the number of normal segments that were removed and saved to the CPTAC-provided cryomolds

variables.name: Participant_Ethnicity
variables.description: Ethnicity using the defined categories

variables.name: Participant_Gender
variables.description: Participant gender using the defined categories

variables.name: Participant_History_Chemotherapy
variables.description: Did participant ever received systematic chemotherapy for any previous cancer

variables.name: Participant_History_Lumpectomy_Mastectomy_or_Port_Placement
variables.description: Indicate whether this participant underwent lumpectomy/mastectomy or port placement

variables.name: Participant_History_Malignancy
variables.description: Indicate whether the participant was, at any time in their life, diagnosed with a malignancy prior to the diagnosis of the specimen submitted for CPTAC.  If the participant has had a prior malignancy, an additional form (the Other Malignancy Form) must be completed for each prior malignancy. (If this question cannot be answered because the answer is unknown, the case will be excluded from CPTAC. If the participant has a history of multiple diagnoses of basal or squamous cell skin cancer, complete an OMF for the first diagnosis for each of these types).

variables.name: Participant_History_Neo-adjuvant_Treatment
variables.description: Did participant received therapy for this cancer prior to sample procurement of the tumor submitted for CPTAC.  If the participant did receive treatment for this cancer prior to procurement, the TSS should contact the BCR for further instructions.(Note: Systemic treatment and certain localized therapies (those administered to the same site as the CPTAC submitted tissue) given prior to procurement of the sample submitted for CPTAC are exclusionary).

variables.name: Participant_History_Radiation_Therapy
variables.description: Indicate whether the participant ever received radiation therapy involving the breast

variables.name: Participant_Procurement_Age
variables.description: Participant age in months at the time of tissue procurement

variables.name: Participant_Race
variables.description: Participant race using the defined categories. Options = American Indian or Alaska Native; Asian; White; Black or African American; Native Hawaiian or other Pacific Islander; Not Evaluated; Unknown (Could not be determined or unsure)

variables.name: Pathologic_M_Stage
variables.description: Using the participant pathology/laboratory report, select the code for the pathologic M (metastasis) defined by the American Joint Committee on Cancer (AJCC).

variables.name: Pathologic_N_Stage
variables.description: Using the participant pathology/laboratory report, select the code for the pathologic N (nodal) defined by the American Joint Committee on Cancer (AJCC).

variables.name: Pathologic_Stage
variables.description: Using the participant pathology/laboratory report, select the stage defined by the American Joint Committee on Cancer (AJCC). The patient must be Stage IIA-IIIC to be included in the CPTAC study.

variables.name: Pathologic_T_Stage
variables.description: Using the participant pathology/laboratory report, select the code for the pathologic T (primary tumor) defined by the American Joint Committee on Cancer (AJCC). If the tumor tissue supplied to CPTAC was obtained using vacuum-assisted coring, you may skip this section if appropriate

variables.name: Progesterone_Receptor_IHC_Percent_Positive
variables.description: If IHC progesterone receptor testing was performed, provide the percent of progesterone receptor positive nuclei by IHC.

variables.name: Progesterone_Receptor_IHC_Positivity_Intensity_Scale
variables.description: Using the pathology/laboratory report, indicate the intensity scale used for the progesterone receptor positivity score.

variables.name: Progesterone_Receptor_IHC_Positivity_Other_Method_Description
variables.description: If a special method was used (other than IHC) to calculate progesterone receptor status (e.g. dextran coated charcoal), describe the method used.

variables.name: Progesterone_Receptor_IHC_Positivity_Other_Scale
variables.description: If another scale was used to measure the progesterone receptor positivity, please describe the scale used.

variables.name: Progesterone_Receptor_IHC_Positivity_Score
variables.description: Provide the positivity score using the IHC intensity scale, found on the pathology/laboratory report. Only answer this question if PR status is considered positive; if the PR status was negative, continue to the HER2/ERBB2 IHC questions.

variables.name: Progesterone_Receptor_Status_by_IHC
variables.description: If IHC progesterone receptor testing was performed, provide the result of the test.  If this test was not performed, select Not Performed,  or Unknown and continue to the HER2/ERBB2 IHC questions.

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: De-Identified subject (participant) ID, from the pre-printed labels that are part of the procurement package provided by the BCR

variables.name: Tissue_Sampling_Method
variables.description: Indicate whether the tissue was obtained via coring or via surgical excision

variables.name: Tumor_Sample_1_Comments
variables.description: Comments regarding the gross appearance of the tumor excisional segment or core

variables.name: Tumor_Sample_1_Excision_Time
variables.description: The 24-hr clock time when tumor segment 1 was excised

variables.name: Tumor_Sample_1_Ischemia_Time
variables.description: Calculated ischemia time. The difference between time of immersion in LN2 and surgical excision time

variables.name: Tumor_Sample_1_LN2_Time
variables.description: The 24-hour clock time when tumor segment 1 was immersed in LN2 vapor

variables.name: Tumor_Sample_1_Weight
variables.description: Weight of tumor segment in mg

variables.name: Tumor_Sample_2_Comments
variables.description: Comments regarding the gross appearance of the tumor excisional segment or core

variables.name: Tumor_Sample_2_Excision_Time
variables.description: The 24-hr clock time when tumor segment 2 was excised

variables.name: Tumor_Sample_2_Ischemia_Time
variables.description: Calculated ischemia time. The difference between time of immersion in LN2 and Surgical excision time

variables.name: Tumor_Sample_2_LN2_Time
variables.description: The 24-hour clock time when the tumor segment 2 was immersed in LN2 vapor.

variables.name: Tumor_Sample_2_Weight
variables.description: Weight of tumor segment in mg

variables.name: Tumor_Sample_3_Comments
variables.description: Comments regarding the gross appearance of the tumor excisional segment or core

variables.name: Tumor_Sample_3_Excision_Time
variables.description: The 24-hr clock time when tumor segment 3 was excised

variables.name: Tumor_Sample_3_Ischemia_Time
variables.description: Calculated ischemia time. The difference between time of immersion in LN2 and Surgical excision time

variables.name: Tumor_Sample_3_LN2_Time
variables.description: The 24-hour clock time when the tumor sample or portion  was immersed in LN2 vapor

variables.name: Tumor_Sample_3_Weight
variables.description: Weight of tumor segment in mg

variables.name: Tumor_Sample_4_Comments
variables.description: Comments regarding the gross appearance of the tumor excisional segment or core

variables.name: Tumor_Sample_4_Excision_Time
variables.description: The 24-hr clock time when tumor segment 4 was excised

variables.name: Tumor_Sample_4_Ischemia_Time
variables.description: Calculated ischemia time. The difference between time of immersion in LN2 and surgical excision time

variables.name: Tumor_Sample_4_LN2_Time
variables.description: The 24-hour clock time when the tumor sample or portion  was immersed in LN2 vapor

variables.name: Tumor_Sample_4_Weight
variables.description: Weight of tumor segment in mg

variables.name: Tumor_Sample_5_Comments
variables.description: Comments regarding the gross appearance of the tumor excisional segment or core

variables.name: Tumor_Sample_5_Excision_Time
variables.description: The 24-hr clock time when tumor segment 5 was excised

variables.name: Tumor_Sample_5_Ischemia_Time
variables.description: Calculated ischemia time. The difference between time of immersion in LN2 and surgical excision time

variables.name: Tumor_Sample_5_LN2_Time
variables.description: The 24-hour clock time when the tumor sample or portion  was immersed in LN2 vapor

variables.name: Tumor_Sample_5_Weight
variables.description: Weight of tumor segment in mg

variables.name: Tumor_Sample_Number
variables.description: Number of tumor excisional segments or cores obtained

tables.description: Subject ID, ethnicity, race, gender, height, weight, first degree relatives with colorectal cancer, medical records of first degree relatives, history of participant colon polyps, history of malignancy of participants, specimen characteristics and collection, anesthesia, tumor characteristics, carcinoembryonic antigen, colon or rectal cancer present, history of participant hemotherapy, and neo-adjuvant tumor treatment of participants with colon, cancer and involved in the "Clinical Proteomic Tumor Analysis Consortium (CPTAC) Proteogenomic Confirmatory Study of Breast, Colon, Lung, and Ovarian Tumors" project.

variables.name: Aliquots_Plasma
variables.description: Number of tubes of plasma obtained from the participant.

variables.name: Anesthesia_Time
variables.description: Time when anesthesia was administered to the participant.

variables.name: Blood_Collection_Method
variables.description: Method for obtaining the blood sample.

variables.name: Blood_Collection_Time
variables.description: The 24-hr clock time on the day of when the CPTAC blood sample(s) was/were collected from the participant.

variables.name: CRF_Name
variables.description: Information collected on Case Report Form (CRF) at

variables.name: Circumferential_Resection_Margin_CRM
variables.description: Measured length (mm) between a malignant lesion of the colon or rectum and the nearest radial (or circumferential) border of tissue removed during surgery for the tumor submitted to CPTAC.

variables.name: Colon_Polyps_History
variables.description: Indicate if the participant had a previous history of colon polyps as noted in the history/physical or previous endoscopic report(s).

variables.name: Colon_Polyps_Present
variables.description: Indicate if polyps were present in the colon, surgically and/or pathologically, at the time of tissue collection for the tumor submitted to CPTAC.

variables.name: Colon_Sub-sites
variables.description: Using the participant pathology/laboratory report, select the anatomic organ subdivision of the tumor submitted for CPTAC.

variables.name: First_Degree_Relatives
variables.description: Total number of first degree relatives (parents, sibling and/or children) .  A record of a participant background regarding health and disease events of blood relatives. A participant family medical history may be important in diagnosing existing conditions.

variables.name: First_Degree_Relatives_with_Colon.Rectal_Cancer
variables.description: The number of first degree relatives (parent, sibling and/or child) associated with a diagnosis of colon or rectal cancer.

variables.name: Gene_Analysis_BRAF
variables.description: Indicate if BRAF gene analysis was performed on tumor submitted for CPTAC. Note: If not performed, skip to question 55 Synchronous Colon/Rectal Tumor(s) at Time of Tissue Collection.

variables.name: Gene_Analysis_KRAS
variables.description: Indicate if KRAS gene analysis was performed on tumor submitted for CPTAC. Note: If not performed, skip to question 53 BRAF Gene Analysis Performed

variables.name: Gene_Analysis_Results_BRAF
variables.description: If BRAF gene analysis was performed indicate the result.

variables.name: Gene_Espression_MLH1
variables.description: Indicate any loss of expression of mismatch repair proteins by immunohistochemistry (IHC) is or is not expressed for each of the listed genes.

variables.name: Gene_Espression_MSH2
variables.description: Indicate any loss of expression of mismatch repair proteins by immunohistochemistry (IHC) is or is not expressed for each of the listed genes.

variables.name: Gene_Espression_MSH6
variables.description: Indicate any loss of expression of mismatch repair proteins by immunohistochemistry (IHC) is or is not expressed for each of the listed genes.

variables.name: Gene_Espression_PMS2
variables.description: Indicate any loss of expression of mismatch repair proteins by immunohistochemistry (IHC) is or is not expressed for each of the listed genes.

variables.name: Gene_Mutation_Codon_KRAS
variables.description: If KRAS mutation was identified indicate the specific codon.

variables.name: Gene_Mutation_Codon_NRAS
variables.description: If NRAS mutation was identified indicate the specific codon.

variables.name: Gene_Mutation_Found_KRAS
variables.description: If KRAS gene analysis was performed indicate if KRAS Mutation was found.

variables.name: Gene_Mutation_Found_NRAS
variables.description: If NRAS gene analysis was performed indicate if NRAS Mutation was found.

variables.name: Histological_Subtype
variables.description: Using the participant pathology/laboratory report, select the histology of the tumor submitted for CPTAC.

variables.name: IHC_Mismatch_Repair_Proteins_Tested
variables.description: Was testing performed to identify any loss of expression in mismatch repair proteins tested by immunohistochemistry (IHC)? Note: If not performed, skip to question 50 KRAS Gene Analysis Performed.

variables.name: Lymph_Nodes_Examined
variables.description: Indicate whether any lymph nodes were examined at the time of the primary resection for the tumor submitted to CPTAC.

variables.name: Lymph_Nodes_Examined_Number
variables.description: Number of lymph nodes pathologically assessed if one or more lymph nodes were removed.

variables.name: Lymph_Nodes_Positive_Hematoxylin_Eosin_Staining_Number
variables.description: Number of lymph nodes identified as positive through hematoxylin and eosin (H&E) staining and light microscopy.

variables.name: Lymph_Nodes_Positive_IHC_Keratin_Staining_Number
variables.description: Provide the number of lymph nodes identified as positive through keratin immunohistochemistry (IHC) staining.

variables.name: Lymphatic_Invasion_Present
variables.description: Indicate if malignant cells are pathologically present in small or thin walled vessels suggesting lymphatic involvement in the tumor submitted to CPTAC.

variables.name: MSI_Loci_Abnormal
variables.description: Number of loci found to be abnormal during testing to detect microsatellite instability in the tumor submitted to CPTAC.

variables.name: MSI_Loci_Tested
variables.description: If microsatellite instability was identified, indicate the number of loci tested to detect recessive mutations in the tumor submitted to CPTAC.

variables.name: Mesentary_Divided_Time
variables.description: The 24-hr clock time of when the mesentery containing the tumor was divided.

variables.name: Microsatellite_Instability_Abnormal
variables.description: Indicate whether microsatellite instability was present in more than 33% of loci tested in the tumor submitted to CPTAC.

variables.name: Normal_Sample_1_Ischemia_Time
variables.description: Calculated ischemia time. The difference between time of immersion in LN2 and  mesentery divided time.

variables.name: Normal_Sample_1_LN2_Time
variables.description: The 24-hour clock time when the normal segment  was immersed in LN2 vapor.

variables.name: Normal_Sample_1_Weight
variables.description: Weight of normal segment in mg.

variables.name: Normal_Sample_2_Ischemia_Time
variables.description: Calculated ischemia time. The difference between time of immersion in LN2 and  mesentery divided time.

variables.name: Normal_Sample_2_LN2_Time
variables.description: The 24-hour clock time when the normal segment  was immersed in LN2 vapor.

variables.name: Normal_Sample_2_Weight
variables.description: Weight of normal segment in mg.

variables.name: Normal_Sample_3_Ischemia_Time
variables.description: Calculated ischemia time. The difference between time of immersion in LN2 and  mesentery divided time.

variables.name: Normal_Sample_3_LN2_Time
variables.description: The 24-hour clock time when the normal segment  was immersed in LN2 vapor.

variables.name: Normal_Sample_3_Weight
variables.description: Weight of normal segment in mg.

variables.name: Normal_Sample_4_Ischemia_Time
variables.description: Calculated ischemia time. The difference between time of immersion in LN2 and  mesentery divided time.

variables.name: Normal_Sample_4_LN2_Time
variables.description: The 24-hour clock time when the normal segment  was immersed in LN2 vapor.

variables.name: Normal_Sample_4_Weight
variables.description: Weight of normal segment in mg.

variables.name: Normal_Sample_5_Ischemia_Time
variables.description: Calculated ischemia time. The difference between time of immersion in LN2 and  mesentery divided time.

variables.name: Normal_Sample_5_LN2_Time
variables.description: The 24-hour clock time when the normal segment  was immersed in LN2 vapor.

variables.name: Normal_Sample_5_Weight
variables.description: Weight of normal segment in mg.

variables.name: Normal_Sample_Number
variables.description: Specify the number of normal segments that were removed and saved to the CPTAC-provided cryomolds.

variables.name: Participant_Ethnicity
variables.description: Ethnicity using the defined categories.

variables.name: Participant_Gender
variables.description: Participant gender using the defined categories.

variables.name: Participant_Height
variables.description: Provide the height of the participant in centimeters.

variables.name: Participant_History_Chemotherapy
variables.description: Did participant ever received systematic chemotherapy for any previous cancer.

variables.name: Participant_History_Malignancy
variables.description: Indicate whether the participant has a history of prior malignancies. Note 1: If this question cannot be answered because the answer is unknown, the case will be excluded from CPTAC. Note 2: If the participant has any history of prior malignancies, please complete an Other Malignancy Form for each malignancy diagnosed prior to the procurement of the tissue submitted for CPTAC. If the participant has a history of multiple diagnoses of basal cell skin cancers, complete an Other Malignancy Form for the first diagnosis for each of these types.

variables.name: Participant_History_Neo-adjuvant_Treatment
variables.description: Did participant received therapy for this cancer prior to sample procurement of the tumor submitted for CPTAC.  If the participant did receive treatment for this cancer prior to procurement, the TSS should contact the BCR for further instructions. Note: Systemic treatment and certain localized therapies (those administered to the same site as the CPTAC submitted tissue) given prior to procurement of the sample submitted for CPTAC are exclusionary.

variables.name: Participant_Procurement_Age
variables.description: Provide the participant age in months at the time of tissue procurement.

variables.name: Participant_Race
variables.description: Participant race using the defined categories. Options = American Indian or Alaska Native;  Asian; White; Black or African American; Native Hawaiian or other Pacific Islander; Not Evaluated; Unknown (Could not be determined or unsure).

variables.name: Participant_Weight
variables.description: Provide the weight of the participant measured in kilograms.

variables.name: Pathologic_Spread_Distant_Metastases
variables.description: Code for the pathologic M (metastasis) as defined by the American Joint Committee on Cancer (AJCC).

variables.name: Pathologic_Spread_Lymph_Nodes
variables.description: Code for the pathologic N (nodal) as defined by the American Joint Committee on Cancer (AJCC).

variables.name: Pathologic_Spread_Primary_Tumor
variables.description: Code for the pathologic T (primary tumor) as defined by the American Joint Committee on Cancer (AJCC).

variables.name: Perineural_Invasion_Present
variables.description: Indicate if perineural invasion or infiltration of tumor or cancer is pathologically present in tumor submitted to CPTAC.

variables.name: Preoperative_or_Pretreatment_CEA_Level
variables.description: Carcinoembryonic antigen or CEA level (ng/ml) prior to the resection of tumor submitted to CPTAC.

variables.name: Primary_Site_Disease
variables.description: Using the participant pathology/laboratory report, select the anatomic site of disease of the tumor submitted for CPTAC.

variables.name: Rectum_Sub-sites
variables.description: Using the patient pathology/laboratory report, select the anatomic organ subdivision of the tumor submitted for CPTAC.

variables.name: Residual_Tumor
variables.description: Using the pathology/laboratory report, select the tissue margin status at the time of surgical resection for the tumor submitted for CPTAC.

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: De-Identified subject (participant) ID, from the pre-printed labels that are part of the procurement package provided by the BCR.

variables.name: Synchronous_Colon_Rectal_Tumors
variables.description: Indicate whether the participant had a synchronous colon or rectal cancer present at the time tissue was procured for CPTAC.

variables.name: Tumor_Sample_1_Ischemia_Time
variables.description: Calculated ischemia time. The difference between time of immersion in LN2 and  mesentery divided time.

variables.name: Tumor_Sample_1_LN2_Time
variables.description: The 24-hour clock time when tumor segment 1 was immersed in LN2 vapor.

variables.name: Tumor_Sample_1_Weight
variables.description: Weight of tumor segment in mg.

variables.name: Tumor_Sample_2_Ischemia_Time
variables.description: Calculated ischemia time. The difference between time of immersion in LN2 and  mesentery divided time.

variables.name: Tumor_Sample_2_LN2_Time
variables.description: The 24-hour clock time when the tumor segment 2 was immersed in LN2 vapor.

tables.description: Subject ID, ethnicity, race, gender, history of malignancy of participants, specimen characteristics and collection, tumor and normal samples, anesthesia, tumor characteristics, age at diagnosis, pathologic diagnosis, diameter of nodule of ovarian carcinoma, anatomic position of tumor, and history of participant hemotherapy, radiation therapy, or neo-adjuvant tumor treatment of participants with ovarian cancer and involved in the "Clinical Proteomic Tumor Analysis Consortium (CPTAC) Proteogenomic Confirmatory Study of Breast, Colon, Lung, and Ovarian Tumors" project.

variables.name: Origin_Site_Disease
variables.description: Using the patient pathology report, select the site of origin of disease.

variables.name: Participant_Ethnicity
variables.description: Ethnicity using the defined categories.

variables.name: Participant_Gender
variables.description: Participant gender using the defined categories.

variables.name: Participant_History_Chemotherapy
variables.description: Did participant ever received systematic chemotherapy for any previous cancer.

variables.name: Participant_History_Hormonal_Therapy
variables.description: Indicate whether the patient received hormonal therapy for cancer within the last five years.

variables.name: Participant_History_Malignancy
variables.description: Indicate whether the patient was, at any time in their life, diagnosed with a malignancy prior to the diagnosis of the specimen submitted for CPTAC.  If the patient has had a prior malignancy, an additional form (the Other Malignancy Form) must be completed for each prior malignancy. (If this question cannot be answered because the answer is unknown, the case will be excluded from CPTAC. If the patient has a history of multiple diagnoses of basal or squamous cell skin cancer, complete an OMF for the first diagnosis for each of these types.)

variables.name: Participant_History_Neo-adjuvant_Treatment
variables.description: Did participant received therapy for this cancer prior to sample procurement of the tumor submitted for CPTAC.  If the participant did receive treatment for this cancer prior to procurement, the TSS should contact the BCR for further instructions.(Note: Systemic treatment and certain localized therapies (those administered to the same site as the CPTAC submitted tissue) given prior to procurement of the sample submitted for CPTAC are exclusionary.)

variables.name: Participant_History_Radiation_Therapy
variables.description: Indicate whether the patient every received radiation therapy involving the abdomen or pelvis.

variables.name: Participant_Jewish_Heritage
variables.description: Name for Jewish heritage categories for a patient/participant on a clinical trial. If the patient is known to be Jewish, but it is not known whether they are Ashkenazi or Sephardic, choose Jewish, NOS.

variables.name: Participant_Procurement_Age
variables.description: Provide the participant age in months at the time of tissue procurement.

variables.name: Participant_Race
variables.description: Participant race using the defined categories. Options = American Indian or Alaska Native; Asian; White; Black or African American;  Native Hawaiian or other Pacific Islander; Not Evaluated; Unknown (Could not be determined or unsure).

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: De-Identified subject (Participant) ID, from the pre-printed labels that are part of the procurement package provided by the BCR.

variables.name: Tumor_Grade
variables.description: Using the patient pathology/laboratory report, select the tumor grade of the tumor submitted to CPTAC.

variables.name: Tumor_Residual_Disease_Max_Diameter
variables.description: Category to represent the maximal diameter in millimeters of the largest remaining nodule of ovarian carcinoma.

variables.name: Tumor_Stage_Ovary_FIGO
variables.description: Assignment of FIGO stage used to select and evaluate therapy, estimate prognosis and calculate end results. (I: Tumor limited to ovaries (one or both), IA: Tumor limited to one ovary: no ascites present containing malignant cells. No tumor on the external surface; capsule intact., IB: Tumor limited to both ovaries; no ascites present containing malignant cells. No tumor on the external surfaces; capsules intact. , IC: Tumor either stage Ia or Ib, but with tumor on surface of one or both ovaries, or with capsule ruptured, or with ascites present containing malignant cells, or with positive peritoneal washings., II: Tumor involving one or both ovaries with pelvic extension. , IIA: Extension and/or metastases to the uterus and/or tubes. , IIB: Extension to other pelvic tissues., IIC: Tumor either stage IIa or IIb, but with tumor on surface of one or both ovaries, or with capsule(s) ruptured, or with ascites present containing malignant cells, or with positive peritoneal washings., III: Tumor involves one or both ovaries with histologically confirmed peritoneal implants outside the pelvis and/or positive regional lymph nodes. Superficial liver metastases equals stage III. Tumor is limited to the true pelvis, but with histologically proven malignant extension to small bowel or omentum., IIIA: Tumor grossly limited to the true pelvis, with negative nodes, but with histologically confirmed microscopic seeding of abdominal peritoneal surfaces, or histologic proven extension to small bowel or mesentery., IIIB: Tumor of one or both ovaries with histologically confirmed implants, peritoneal metastasis of abdominal peritoneal surfaces, none exceeding 2 cm in diameter; nodes are negative., IIIC: Peritoneal metastasis beyond the pelvis >2 cm in diameter and/or positive regional lymph nodes., IV: Growth involving one or both ovaries with distant metastases. If pleural effusion is present, there must be positive cytology to allot a case to stage IV. Parenchymal liver metastasis equals stage IV. )

variables.name: Tumor_Surgical_Devascularized_Time
variables.description: The 24-hr clock time when the tumor was de-vascularized.

tables.description: Sample ID, histological diagnosis, histopathology quality, specimen type, and tissue necrosis of samples of participants with colon, or breast, or ovarian cancer and involved in the "Clinical Proteomic Tumor Analysis Consortium (CPTAC) Proteogenomic Confirmatory Study of Breast, Colon, Lung, and Ovarian Tumors" project.

variables.name: Absorbance_260
variables.description: Spectral absorbance at 260A for 260/280 ratio for DNA or RNA quality.

variables.name: Absorbance_280
variables.description: Spectral absorbance at 280A for 260/280 ratio for DNA or RNA quality.

variables.name: Collection_Status
variables.description: Collection Status, were samples collected?

variables.name: Concentration
variables.description: Concentration of the molecular specimen.

variables.name: HistologicalDiagnosis
variables.description: Histological diagnosis of primary tumor or cells (*).

variables.name: Histopathology_Quality
variables.description: Histopathology quality.

variables.name: Initial_Quantity
variables.description: Quantity of the specimen when the specimen was first received

variables.name: Pathological_Status
variables.description: Pathological status of tissue such as malignant or other status.

variables.name: RIN_Value
variables.description: RNA integrity number (RIN) from an algorithm for assigning integrity values to RNA measurements.

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Unique specimen label. Barcode. The extension (_Dn) indicates a derivative of a parent sample. For example abdc1234_D4 is derived from abdc1234.

variables.name: Short_Specimen_Label
variables.description: Short name for specimen used by sequencing contractor in file names. There is some inconsistency in the use of a dash - or an underscore _  in naming. A 1-DN sample ID may have a file name 1_DN. DN=normal tissue DNA; DM=tumor tissue, DNA; R= mRNA; SR=small RNA.

variables.name: Specimen_Class
variables.description: High level grouping of specimens.

variables.name: Specimen_Comments
variables.description: Comments on specimen

variables.name: Specimen_Parent_Label
variables.description: Unique specimen label. Barcode for the parent sample in Specimen_Label

variables.name: Specimen_Parent_Title
variables.description: Description of specimen source, related to tissue sample in clinical variables.

variables.name: Specimen_Pooled
variables.description: Were multiple samples pooled to create this sample?

variables.name: Specimen_Type
variables.description: Specific specimen type.

variables.name: Tissue_Necrosis
variables.description: Percent necrosis.

variables.name: Tissue_Review_Comments
variables.description: Tissue review comments.

variables.name: Total_Cellularity
variables.description: Percentage of cross sectional area of a solid tissue section observed to be occupied by nucleated cells.

variables.name: Tumor_Cellularity
variables.description: Percent tumor cellularity

variables.name: AFFECTION_STATUS
variables.description: Case control status of the subject (most or all should be 2= Case).

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: De-identified subject ID
